excerpts.excerpt:
MIKE ALLRED
Well, Canada, actually. You
familiar with these guys?
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Loewen Group. Of course I’m
familiar... What about them?
MIKE ALLRED
From what I’m told, they’ve been on
a pretty significant acquisition
spree. Going all across the
country, buying up every
independently-owned funeral chain
they can get their hands on. These
guys are really big players...
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Christ, Mike. You know how I feel
about all these big corporations-
All they care about is profit and
don’t give a damn about people, or
community.
CONTINUED: (2)12 12
Production White (03/02/22) 9.
CONTINUED: (3)12 12
Production White (03/02/22) 10.

Production White (03/02/22) 13.
CONTINUED:16 16
Production White (03/02/22) 14.
OMIT17 17
EXT. OCEAN - NIGHT18 18
We watch the sleek outline of Loewen’s yacht cut across the
ocean horizon and see all the lights twinkling from inside.
INT. LOEWEN YACHT/ GALLEY/ DINING CABIN - NIGHT 19 19
ANGLE ON: The HAND OF A CHEF as he carefully arranges garnish
upon a PLATTER OF LOBSTER. We then move into the DINING
CABIN, where all 5 men are all seated around a large table.
RAY LOEWEN
My old man was a small town
undertaker- Same as yours, right,
Jerry? Who inherited the business
from his father, just like yours.
Growing up, my dad had about 5
homes, doing a couple hundred calls
per year. And he was proud of that.

As he slides all the PAPERWORK under to her, she takes it in
her hands, glancing over the front page.
SECRETARY IN COURTHOUSE(CONT’D)
Jeremiah J. O’Keefe Sr. Vs Loewen
Group LLC- Oooooh, sounds salty!
Who do you think’s gonna win?
PARALEGAL IN COURTHOUSE
Excuse me?
SECRETARY IN COURTHOUSE
(stamping the paper)
Never mind. Have a seat over there,
someone will be with you shortly.
INT. O’KEEFE RESIDENCE/ DINING ROOM - NIGHT23 23
Sometime in the evening, Jerry and Annette sit opposite each
other at their dining room table, having dinner.
CONTINUED: (2)20 20
Production White (03/02/22) 19.
CONTINUED:23 23
Production White (03/02/22) 20.
ANNETTE O’KEEFE
Are you really planning on going
through with this whole lawsuit
thing?

But they refused to hold up their
end of the deal.
HAL DOCKINS
Basically, Loewen knew Jerry was in
trouble, and that if they just ran
the clock on the deal, he’d end up
going bankrupt. Then they could buy
not only his three funeral homes,
but his entire company, for yard
sale prices... Oh and he’s also
Canadian.
WILLIE GARY
Canadian? Who’s Canadian, Loewen?
CONTINUED: (2)31 31
Production White (03/02/22) 29.
CONTINUED: (3)31 31
(MORE)
Production White (03/02/22) 30.
HAL DOCKINS
Look, all we want is just to be
able to hold Loewen Group
responsible for their actions.

CONTINUED: (2)33 33
Production White (03/02/22) 33.
CONTINUED: (3)33 33
Production White (03/02/22) 34.
HAL DOCKINS
The truth is, Ray Loewen happens to
sit at the top of one of the
biggest secret industries in this
country. I’m talking about the
nearly 20 billion dollar ‘death-
care’ industry. What’s more, there
are only two huge corporations out
there, that are slowly moving in
and taking over everything. And The
Loewen Group is one of them. What
they did to Jerry is awful, but I
have a feeling it’s not even the
tip of the iceberg...
(another deep breath)
Should I, um, go on?
WILLIE GARY
Sure, go ahead...

Production White (03/02/22) 39.
CONTINUED:40 40
Production White (03/02/22) 40.
MIKE ALLRED
Man to man...?
WILLIE GARY
Man to man. I want to know how you
feel about it?
MIKE ALLRED
Okay, well. If you, um, really want
an honest answer... Truth be told,
I suppose I am a little prejudice.
Just as the room instantly falls silent. Long Beat.
MIKE ALLRED (CONT’D)
I’m not saying I’m proud of it. In
fact, I’ve been working real hard,
on trying to overcome it...
HAL DOCKINS
(sotto voce)
Jesus, this really had to come out
now...?

CHRIS WAKEFIELD
Sounds to me like your original
claim was about 94 million short.
HAL DOCKINS
Could you maybe walk us through how-
MIKE ALLRED
100 million, it’s absurd and you
know it! What are you trying to do,
destroy this case! It’s ridiculous!
REGGIE DOUGLAS
Yo Mike, anybody ever tell you, you
got the balls of a garden slug?
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Willie, I’m afraid I share
everyone’s concerns, it’s way too
much. We throw out a number like
that, we’ll humiliate ourselves.
CONTINUED:43 43
Production White (03/02/22) 45.
CONTINUED: (2)43 43
Production White (03/02/22) 46.
WILLIE GARY
I hear you Jerry, I do. But you
just gotta trust me okay. Okay,
where was I...

WILLIE GARY
Hey, let’s put on some music!
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
I like music, Willie. *
Willie then turns to the front where a large AFRICAN AMERICAN
MAN, one of his bodyguards, STEVE, sits reading a book.
WILLIE GARY
Yo Steve, let’s put some music on.
STEVE PLANE GUY
Sure thing Boss, anything in
particular you feel like hearing?
WILLIE GARY
Know what, put on that one I like,
by um- whatsitcall-Tony Toni Tone!
(then back to Jerry)
You like ‘Tony Toni Tone’, Jerry?
On Jerry, he looks a bit perplexed, as it’s fairly clear he’s
never heard of them. Just as MUSIC- (TONY TONI TONE/ FEELS
GOOD)- now comes BLASTING in! While Willie instantly starts
bopping to the music, it takes Jerry a beat or two to
determine how he feels. Until gradually, Jerry starts gently
bopping too. Bopping together, they smile at each other.
WILLIE GARY (CONT’D)
YOU LIKE IT JERRY?

CONTINUED: (2)59 59
(MORE)
Production White (03/02/22) 59.
HAL DOCKINS
What I mean is, I’m not so sure
it’s possible to actually prove
Loewen Group had motive. Unless we
had some kind of memo from within
the company, or someone openly
admitting it. Like how do you
actually prove that there was an
intention behind stalling?... And
by the way, I can grow facial hair.
I’m a 29 year old man.
CHRIS WAKEFIELD
Seems to me, if we really want the
jury to throw down an Alaskan-
Assassin body-blow on the punitive,
we also gotta prove Loewen himself
knew. That Big Man was in on it.

WILLIE GARY
What you’re saying is you think
that black people’s American Dream
is a different American Dream from
white people’s American Dream?
MAME DOWNES
Obviously, given that black
Americans and white Americans are
currently living in two separate
countries. Case in point...
Mame motions over to a SMALL TV above the bar, where the ever
ubiquitous OJ TRIAL COVERAGE continues to play on.
WILLIE GARY
Ah, so we talkin’ OJ now! The quote-
unquote ‘trial of the century’. You
really want to go there?
MAME DOWNES
I don’t know, do we dare? I’ll
admit it’s murky territory...

WILLIE GARY
I mean, I ripped it up! And man,
you should’ve seen her face. No
joke, she looked like she was about
to have a heart attack!
HAL DOCKINS
Okay, but wait a minute. You don’t
even know what was in there, what
the offer was. It could’ve been a
substantial amount of money.
WILLIE GARY
Maybe so. But it wasn’t no 100
million dollars, I know that.
Besides, what are you all bothered
about? Ain’t you the one that told
me this case needed to go bigger.
HAL DOCKINS
Yeah, sort of. But I didn’t mean at
the risk of you getting disbarred.
WILLIE GARY
Disbarred!? Woah, what, disbarred!?
What the hell you talking about,
disbarred? Whose side are you on?

Before the door at last opens and a YOUNG CLERK peeks in.
YOUNG CLERK
Mr. O’Keefe, Mr. Gary, Mr. Allred-
Soon as you’re all ready, the Judge
would like to begin.
Just as Willie JUMPS UP.
WILLIE GARY
Showtime! Everybody ready! Let’s
get it on Chaka Kahn!
INT. JACKSON MS COURTROOM - MORNING69 69
For the first time ever inside the courtroom- we PUSH IN FAST
to a tight CLOSE UP on the BAILIFF, as she LOUDLY announces:
BAILIFF
All rise, all rise. The honorable
judge James E. Graves- Circuit
court judge of the first judicial
district of Hinds County,
Mississippi- presiding. This court
is now in session pursuant to the
adjournment. Hear ye, hear ye, all
persons having business with this
honorable court draw near, give
your attention and you shall be-
MONTAGE UP:70 70

She ain’t got the stomach for it.
EXT. JACKSON MS COURTHOUSE - MORNING72 72
We slowly PAN across a long MURAL. Which also happens to
feature a scenic rendering of an OLD SOUTHERN SLAVE SCENE. It
then dissolves into an enormous PHOTOGRAPH of the O’KEEFE
FAMILY. The same photo we saw taken in the beginning.
MAME DOWNES
I’m sorry, your honor, but is this
photo really necessary?
WILLIE GARY
I don’t know what she’s talking
about. This here is a photo of the
O’Keefe family. It shows what’s
really at stake for the man...
The Judge just looks at Willie, before pointing a finger into
the audience, where we see the ENTIRE O’KEEFE FAMILY sitting.
CONTINUED:71 71
Production White (03/02/22) 77.
CONTINUED:72 72
Pink Revised Pages (03/28/22) 78.

JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
I’d agree...
MAME DOWNES
Sorry, I’m so sorry Mr. O’Keefe, I
couldn’t hear that answer...?
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
I said, yes, I’d agree.
MAME DOWNES
Yes. Good, thank you... So,
character. Let’s talk about
character. Because in the testimony
you just gave, we heard a lot about
character. In fact, I believe the
overall insinuation being made, is
that while you are a man of honor,
of strong moral principles.
According to you, my client is not.
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
I think Mr. Loewen and I have very
different approaches to how we deal
with people in business.

CONTINUED:75 75
Pink Revised Pages (03/28/22) 82A.
CONTINUED: (2)75 75
Production White (03/02/22) 83.
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Why am I angry at you? You were
supposed to protect me up there!
You were supposed to make sure I
was safe under cross examination!
Look at what just happened!
WILLIE GARY
Yeah, but it’s not my fault! How
was I supposed to know she was
going to bring all that-
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Because it’s your JOB to know!!

LORRAINE MCGRATH
Over there, they hiked up the price
to something crazy, like 3x what it
was supposed to cost. Just because
they could, because customers
didn’t have anywhere else to go...
MIKE ALLRED
So basically, if I understand you,
the Loewen group was involved in a
form of systematic price gouging?
MAME DOWNES
OBJECTION your honor!! How
would she possibly know the
intentions of people she’s
never met before...
JUDGE GRAVES
Sustained. I agree.
MIKE ALLRED
Let me ask you this, Mrs. McGrath.
In your time at Durban and Sons,
were you ever left with the
impression that the Loewen Group
might’ve been specifically
targeting minorities, in...

WILLIE GARY
Jesus Christ!! Mike, seriously man,
what the hell, what’s the story?
REGGIE DOUGLAS
You know the story! The story is
this man is a tried and true
racist! I mean he literally told us
RIGHT TO OUR FACES, right when we
first met this nigga!
MIKE ALLRED
No, that’s not true. I never said I
was racist! Okay yes, my
grandfather was once a member of
the Ku Klux Klan.
CONTINUED: (6)83 83
(MORE)
Pink Revised Pages (03/28/22) 96.
CONTINUED:84 84
MIKE ALLRED (CONT’D)
Pink Revised Pages (03/28/22) 96A.
But so were a lot of people’s
grandfather’s. It’s the South!

JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Indiantown, okay? How far is that?
GLORIA GARY
About 20 miles. Tell you what, if
you give me a minute to grab my
keys, I can drive you there myself.
JEREMIAH O’KEEFE
Are you sure? I’m happy to take a
taxi, I wouldn’t want to impose...
She looks at him a little funny, then smiles.
GLORIA GARY
No, no, it’s all good. Come on now,
I got you Jerry.
EXT. LANDSCAPE - DAY90 90
In a majestic SUPER WIDE, we look out across the vast Florida
landscape, seeing Gloria’s little Mercedes, the lone car for
miles, cut straight across the horizon.
INT. GLORIA’S MERCEDES - SAME TIME91 91
Gloria and Jerry sit side by side in Gloria’s car.
GLORIA GARY
So, what made you come all the way
down from Mississippi? Are you and
my husband having some kind of
lover’s quarrel...?
Confused by the question, Jerry suddenly gets tongue-tied.

CUT TO:
NBC WITNESS 3/MALE
He assured the coffin I bought for
my mom was the least expensive one.
Come to find out the one they sold
me was three times more than
average. When your own preacher
comes to you telling you need
something, and you’re religious.
You believe it.
CUT TO:
NBC WITNESS 4/ FEMALE
I had heard they were offering some
kind of “grief counseling” at the
church, and thought it would be
worth trying. But rather than give
me any comfort, the deacon assigned
to be counsellor used it as an
opportunity to shove me a bunch of
brochures in my face and try and
recruit me as a Loewen sales rep.
